auth.label: API Key
auth.description: Simple Analytics API key used with the Api-Key header. Create it in your account settings: https://docs.simpleanalytics.com/api/authenticate.

extraFields.label: User ID
extraFields.description: Simple Analytics user ID required for Admin API and Export API requests. It is shown in your account settings: https://docs.simpleanalytics.com/api/authenticate.

actions.name: export_data_points
actions.description: Export raw datapoints from the Simple Analytics Export API.

hostname.description: The website hostname tracked in Simple Analytics.

start.description: Date or hour range in YYYY-MM-DD or YYYY-MM-DDTHH format.

end.description: Date or hour range in YYYY-MM-DD or YYYY-MM-DDTHH format.

timezone.description: IANA timezone used to interpret the selected date range.

type.description: Datapoint type filter used by the export.

inputSchema.description: The input payload for exporting raw datapoints.

format.description: Export response format returned by the provider.

csv.description: CSV payload when the export format is csv.

added_iso.description: ISO 8601 timestamp when the datapoint was recorded.

path.description: Page path associated with the datapoint.

session_id.description: Session identifier associated with the datapoint.

is_unique.description: Whether the datapoint is marked as unique.

items.description: A raw datapoint returned by the Export API.

datapoints.description: Datapoints returned by the Export API when the format is json.

amount.description: Number of datapoints returned by the export.

finishedInMs.description: Time spent generating the export in milliseconds.

meta.description: Export metadata returned by Simple Analytics.

anyOf.description: The raw JSON payload returned by Simple Analytics.

added_iso.description: ISO 8601 timestamp when the datapoint was recorded.

path.description: Page path associated with the datapoint.

session_id.description: Session identifier associated with the datapoint.

is_unique.description: Whether the datapoint is marked as unique.

items.description: A raw datapoint returned by the Export API.

anyOf.description: The raw datapoint array returned by Simple Analytics.

raw.description: The raw export payload returned by Simple Analytics.

outputSchema.description: The normalized export response returned by Simple Analytics.

actions.name: get_aggregated_stats
actions.description: Get aggregated website statistics from the Simple Analytics Stats API.

hostname.description: The website hostname tracked in Simple Analytics.

start.description: Date or hour range in YYYY-MM-DD or YYYY-MM-DDTHH format.

end.description: Date or hour range in YYYY-MM-DD or YYYY-MM-DDTHH format.

timezone.description: IANA timezone used to interpret the selected date range.

page.description: Filter the response to a specific page path.

referrer.description: Filter the response to a specific referrer.

includeHistogram.description: Whether to include the histogram field in the response.

inputSchema.description: The input payload for the Stats API request.

ok.description: Whether the Stats API request succeeded.

docs.description: Documentation URL returned by the Stats API.

hostname.description: Hostname used for the stats request.

url.description: Website URL associated with the hostname.

path.description: Path scope applied to the stats request.

start.description: Resolved start timestamp for the stats response.

end.description: Resolved end timestamp for the stats response.

version.description: Stats API version used for the response.

timezone.description: Timezone used to generate the stats response.

pageviews.description: Total pageviews in the selected range.

visitors.description: Total visitors in the selected range.

seconds_on_page.description: Median seconds on page in the selected range.

value.description: Bucket label returned by Simple Analytics.

pageviews.description: Total pageviews counted for the bucket.

visitors.description: Total unique visitors counted for the bucket.

seconds_on_page.description: Median seconds on page for the bucket when Simple Analytics includes it.

items.description: An aggregated metric bucket returned by Simple Analytics.

pages.description: Page buckets returned by the Stats API.

value.description: Bucket label returned by Simple Analytics.

pageviews.description: Total pageviews counted for the bucket.

visitors.description: Total unique visitors counted for the bucket.

seconds_on_page.description: Median seconds on page for the bucket when Simple Analytics includes it.

items.description: An aggregated metric bucket returned by Simple Analytics.

countries.description: Country buckets returned by the Stats API.

value.description: Bucket label returned by Simple Analytics.

pageviews.description: Total pageviews counted for the bucket.

visitors.description: Total unique visitors counted for the bucket.

seconds_on_page.description: Median seconds on page for the bucket when Simple Analytics includes it.

items.description: An aggregated metric bucket returned by Simple Analytics.

referrers.description: Referrer buckets returned by the Stats API.

value.description: Bucket label returned by Simple Analytics.

pageviews.description: Total pageviews counted for the bucket.

visitors.description: Total unique visitors counted for the bucket.

seconds_on_page.description: Median seconds on page for the bucket when Simple Analytics includes it.

items.description: An aggregated metric bucket returned by Simple Analytics.

browser_names.description: Browser buckets returned by the Stats API.

value.description: Bucket label returned by Simple Analytics.

pageviews.description: Total pageviews counted for the bucket.

visitors.description: Total unique visitors counted for the bucket.

seconds_on_page.description: Median seconds on page for the bucket when Simple Analytics includes it.

items.description: An aggregated metric bucket returned by Simple Analytics.

os_names.description: OS buckets returned by the Stats API.

value.description: Bucket label returned by Simple Analytics.

pageviews.description: Total pageviews counted for the bucket.

visitors.description: Total unique visitors counted for the bucket.

seconds_on_page.description: Median seconds on page for the bucket when Simple Analytics includes it.

items.description: An aggregated metric bucket returned by Simple Analytics.

device_types.description: Device type buckets returned by the Stats API.

date.description: Date label for the histogram bucket in YYYY-MM-DD format.

pageviews.description: Total pageviews in the histogram bucket.

visitors.description: Total visitors in the histogram bucket.

items.description: A histogram bucket returned by the Stats API.

histogram.description: Histogram buckets returned by the Stats API.

name.description: Event name returned by Simple Analytics.

total.description: Total event count for the selected range.

items.description: An event total returned by Simple Analytics.

events.description: Event totals returned by the Stats API.

generated_in_ms.description: Server-side generation time reported by Simple Analytics.

raw.description: The raw JSON payload returned by Simple Analytics.

outputSchema.description: The normalized stats response returned by Simple Analytics.

actions.name: list_websites
actions.description: List websites available to the authenticated Simple Analytics account.

inputSchema.description: The input payload for listing tracked websites.

success.description: Whether the Admin API request succeeded.

is_public.description: Whether the website is publicly accessible.

has_ssl.description: Whether the website serves traffic over HTTPS.

has_script.description: Whether the tracking script was detected on the website.

pageviews.description: Total pageviews recorded for the website.

events.description: Total custom events recorded for the website.

own_hostname.description: Custom analytics hostname configured for the website when present.

items.description: A website summary returned by the Admin API.

websites.description: Tracked websites returned by the Admin API.

outputSchema.description: The website list returned by the Simple Analytics Admin API.

actions.name: send_event
actions.description: Send a server-side event or pageview to Simple Analytics.

type.description: Type of server-side submission to send.

hostname.description: The website hostname tracked in Simple Analytics.

event.description: Event name recorded by Simple Analytics.

ua.description: User agent string sent to the server-side events endpoint.

path.description: Page path associated with the event.

referrer.description: Referrer URL associated with the event.

source.description: UTM source associated with the event.

campaign.description: UTM campaign associated with the event.

additionalProperties.description: A flat metadata value supported by Simple Analytics.

metadata.description: Flat metadata values attached to the server-side event.

inputSchema.description: The input payload for submitting a server-side event.

success.description: Whether the event submission was accepted.

message.description: Optional message returned by the events endpoint.

outputSchema.description: The acknowledgement returned by the server-side events endpoint.
